title: Pixel Cursor ++
description: resourcepack adds new windows-like, but pixelated cursors to MC using the Cursors Extended mod o( вқӣбҙ—вқӣ )o
body:
# рҹ–ұпёҸ Pixel Cursor ++

![default](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75a22103d99179acff22d9dfc510af9494349675.png) ![busy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42a7381324544d4be26e21d18fb4fd46142efe75.gif)![touch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e0b6df7306e66240ee779a4f2e8650b1e583406.png) ![grab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a425d9323053de03f9d5ca0e3794620886031289.png) ![moveall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b524a5bb3079f03c72a36af4e250bf83927b06b8.png) ![movelr](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/280dac50ff47699b3e17b9e53f762a85dfddc9c3.png) ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46c6e1fd5c024652ccfe250643f1d6e5e5b6a889.png) ![movev](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52bc263e29dadf8c8dd0300d45f89627625f58e7.png) ![moveh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25cd3e45fd945f39e2a50ec27e1483763ab1ccfc.png) ![crosshair](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/554e48b0db044c5005a2e177e841d00c2dacbf64.png) ![beam](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d77b65622815e5c2e804a1fed09f891634ef0aa5.png) ![unavaible](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c228a28b192d3ab1143d7d303b5a33ab54292df.png)

Pixel Cursor ++ brings a sharp, windows-like aesthetic to Minecraft. It replaces the default pointer with high-quality, pixelated cursors that feel right at home in a blocky world! (ВҙпҪЎвҖў бө• вҖўпҪЎ`) вҷЎ

Uses a [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor) mod owo

## вңЁ Features
- Pixel Sharp: Clean, aliased edges for that perfect retro look.
- OS Style: Inspired by familiar Windows navigation. (пјҚПүпјҚ)
- Better UI: High visibility during crafting and menu navigation.

## рҹҺЁ Inspiration

Inspired by the [Familiar Pixel Cursors](https://astropulse.itch.io/familiar-pixel-cursors) set created by Astropulse. вң©В°пҪЎвӢҶвёң(аҘӮпҪЎвҖўПүвҖўпҪЎ)

## рҹӣ пёҸ Requirement

вқ— **IMPORTANT** вқ—

This pack requires the following mod to function:
- [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor)
(Without it, the custom textures won't show up! в”җ(вҖҳпҪһ`;)в”Ң)

## рҹҡҖ How to Install

1. Install [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor)
1. Drop the [Pixel Cursor ++.zip](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-cursor++/versions) into your resourcepacks folder
1. Enable it in-game and enjoy! гғҪ(вҢ’в–ҪвҢ’)пҫү
